entries.title: plastic
entries.description: Intent-driven state management for AI coding sessions. Neuroplasticity for your codebase.

entries.title: agent-decision-record
entries.description: Structured decision-making for AI coding agents. Creates auditable Agent Decision Records (AgDR) when technical choices are made — selecting libraries, patterns, or architecture.

entries.title: eai-gofer
entries.description: Gofer core pipeline: /0_gofer_start through /6_gofer_validate, plus optional helper commands.

entries.title: cc-soul
entries.description: Persistent memory and code intelligence for Claude Code. Claude learns your preferences, remembers your codebase, anticipates your needs, and gets smarter over time. 150+ tools. Local-first. Zero configuration.

entries.title: create-cmp
entries.description: Scaffold AND maintain production-ready Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform apps (Android + iOS) — conversational interview, toolchain auto-bootstrap, proven-green version-set upgrades, a doctor that heals any KMP project, an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots), and an Appium test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).

entries.title: temporal-reasoning
entries.description: Temporal Reasoning gives AI coding agents bi-temporal graph memory: query any past state, traverse live dependency graphs, and correlate architectural decisions with structural change — all with deterministic Datalog, no fuzzy retrieval.

entries.title: loop-engineer
entries.description: Design, launch, verify, repair, and improve agent loops. A Claude-Code-native architect+operator for long-running, verifiable, self-improving agentic-coding systems.

entries.title: inkbox
entries.description: Inkbox email and phone SDK skills for Claude Code.

entries.title: api-expert
entries.description: Expert API design, review, debugging, optimization, security auditing, spec generation, migration, and deprecation. Runs on the session model — always the strongest available Claude. Backed by embedded reference files covering architecture patterns, schema design, authentication, authorization, security hardening, client access, performance, observability, testing, inter-service communication, and API lifecycle, plus a canonical OWASP API Top 10 2023 checklist. Optionally grounds itself further with goodmem (memory) and serena (semantic code navigation) MCP servers if configured — works standalone from the embedded references if not. Handles REST/GraphQL/gRPC/tRPC/Connect, OAuth 2.1/OIDC, multi-tenancy, RFC 9457 errors, rate limiting, OTel observability, and the full API lifecycle from spec to sunset.

entries.title: loreconvo
entries.description: Vault your Claude conversations. Captures session decisions, artifacts, and context across Code, Cowork, and Chat. Organizes memory by project, skill, and persona. Never re-explain yourself again.

entries.title: polygram
entries.description: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entries.title: skill-manager
entries.description: Three-tier activation manager for agent assets (skills, subagents, commands, workflows): keep a large library dormant at zero context cost and activate only what each project needs, via a symlink/junction/tracked-copy ladder with drift detection and repair.

entries.title: agentflow
entries.description: Tech-stack-agnostic dev workflow for a single GitHub repo: a PO/DEV/QC agent team coordinated via GitHub issues + flow:* labels and a required GitHub Projects v2 board, with parallel /start terminals that claim work via issue assignee. Ships 4 core skills (setup-agentflow, project-board-protocol, git-flow-working, figma-design) and lets each project add role-prefixed skills (dev-*, qc-*, po-*). Fully specified connections (token + MCP server) for GitHub, GitHub Projects, and Figma, secure .env secret management, and a single-source-of-truth config describing dynamic project surfaces (any mix of backend/frontend/mobile/…).

entries.title: multi-code-review
entries.description: Consensus code review by independent models: Claude + OpenAI Codex in parallel, with optional Google Antigravity (Gemini) as a third reviewer. Findings are cross-verified and merged into one report.

entries.title: vibing-nvim
entries.description: Neovim MCP tools, skills, and subagents for vibing.nvim — lets Claude Code read/edit buffers, drive LSP, and manage windows in a running Neovim instance.

entries.title: token-optimizer
entries.description: Cuts token consumption in coding sessions by rewriting verbose commands, compressing tool output, reminding about /compact, and routing simple tasks to cheap Haiku subagents.

entries.title: kordoc
entries.description: Parse, generate, fill, patch, compare, validate, and render Korean official documents (HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, DOCX, XLS/XLSX) in Claude — 공문서 프리셋 생성, 서식 보존 빈칸 채우기, 라운드트립 패치, 조판 SVG 렌더. Powered by the kordoc npm CLI/MCP — no Hancom Office required.

entries.title: into-the-unknown

Bundles two skills: project-overview (interviews you to build the overview) and project-docs (produces PRD, SRS, Contract & Invariants, Transition, Architecture, API Spec, and Visual Identity in a dependency-ordered chain).

entries.description: A free-first AI revenue operating system for GM Car A/C Service: A/C, general servicing, car electricals, competitors, ads, local SEO, WhatsApp sales, fleet outreach, and training growth.

entries.title: swiss-cheese
entries.description: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. This plugin initializes Swiss Cheese defense layers in your repository, runs a token-frugal multi-agent code review from one shared diff, works autonomously in a loop applying the layers, guides you through building custom layers, audits docs/ADRs/review style, and discovers where task knowledge lives (Jira, Redmine, MCP servers).

entries.title: knowledge-foundry
entries.description: Governed pipeline for building trusted, licensed, versioned, RAG-ready domain corpora, driven by the deterministic kf CLI. Install the CLI with: npm install -g @knowledge-foundry/cli

entries.title: shipflow
entries.description: ShipFlow for Claude Code: dedicated /shipflow-* commands (loop, status, issues, PRs, releases) plus a natural-language skill. Bundles the renaiss-shipflow CLI (no separate install) and self-updates on use.

entries.title: ai-agent-kit
entries.description: Tool-agnostic engineering skills (stacks + cross-cutting concerns) for Claude Code. The skills layer of ai-agent-kit, installable via the plugin marketplace. For full multi-tool setup (Codex + Antigravity + hooks + commands + docs scaffolding) use the install script instead.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entries.title: software-engineer
entries.description: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entries.title: keel
entries.description: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entries.title: maestro-code
entries.description: THE single entry point for any software task — the master router (dev-orchestrator) + code-reviewer, debugger, test-author.

entries.title: sutra
entries.description: Orchestrator for claude-skills-pack — unifies code_assist, sb, and unabridged behind one bridged command surface. Owns the capability registry, the artifact interchange schema, the cross-plugin recall fusion, and the verify→lesson→recall feedback loop. Members stay fully standalone; sutra makes them cooperate. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, and a session hook.

entries.title: thinking
entries.description: Sequential thinking MCP server for structured problem analysis

entries.title: eval
entries.description: Agent output quality evaluation — multi-rubric scoring, strategy benchmarking, and A/B prompt experiments

entries.title: trace

entries.title: maestro-security
entries.description: THE single entry point for any security task — the authorization-first master router (security-orchestrator) + threat-modeler, secure-code-reviewer, vuln-analyst, remediation-engineer.

entries.title: maestro-bi
entries.description: THE single entry point for any data/BI task — the master router (bi-orchestrator) + sql-analyst, metric-definer, insight-narrator, dashboard-designer.

entries.title: typescript-ui
entries.description: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: dashboard
entries.description: Web dashboard for .xm project state — visualize builds, probes, solvers, reviews, evals, humble lessons, traces, memory

entries.title: apple-ui-craft
entries.description: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven agents, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude), that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (~103,000 lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts, and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: humble

Holds knowledge handed to it via a generic ingest primitive (the sutra orchestrator feeds it parsed repo artifacts). Self-healing vault-repair + project-linkage maintenance and optional auto lesson-mining. Subcommands under /sb:.

Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, dedicated subagents, and session/git-guard hooks.

entries.title: code-quality-atlas
entries.description: A research-derived suite of 34 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entries.description: Sogni Creative Agent: image, video, and music generation via Sogni AI's decentralized GPU network. Supports personas, persistent memories, style transfer, and multi-step creative workflows.

One command creates a live hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes. No signup, no key for your first workspace. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY later to unlock more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.

entries.title: baz
entries.description: Baz codebase exploration — indexed search across your org's repos via MCP.

entries.title: clawness
entries.description: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 119 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + RRF + concept expansion, pure Python), a per-codebase lessons-learned memory injected every turn, Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate, and session security hardening (an access guard that forces a prompt on likely exfiltration/destructive tool calls, and a trust ledger that flags changed skills/agents). No Docker, no services, no ML models. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs PyYAML (the only dependency) into your environment.

entries.title: atl
entries.description: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entries.title: pandastack
entries.description: Personal AI operator OS for Claude Code. Skill-only (no agents, no commands), 19 skills organized into engineering / productivity / writing / meta buckets under skills/, tiered via manifest.toml. Covers dev / writing / knowledge lifecycles with a review-and-ship learning loop, plus a skill-construction quality loop (writing-great-skills + skill-eval).

entries.title: appscope
entries.description: Honest, self-hosted app market intelligence as a Claude Code skill. Collects store rankings, metadata, install buckets, and reviews locally; produces confidence-banded download/revenue estimates (never fabricated, never above MEDIUM); renders an app-intel report. Opt-in federation of public calibration anchors.

entries.title: nabu-claude
entries.description: Nabu-claude — личный ИИ-Совет для всех сфер жизни внутри Claude Code: 73 агента (9 министров, специалисты, конвейер) как субагенты; адъютант-оркестратор — skill. Локальный standalone-стек (docker, zero-config), workspace ~/nabu, проактивные задачи, самоулучшение (Commons).

Adds slash commands (/switchroom:setup, /switchroom:start, /switchroom:stop, /switchroom:status) and skills for install, status, logs, config, restart, reconcile, schedule, and health.

entries.title: build-agent

Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entries.title: github-project

entries.title: honey
entries.description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost: less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON). Plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents that return compressed handoffs. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; correctness and safety-critical paths stay exact.

entries.description: Utility skills for Claude Code — discovery, git operations, plugin management, and general tooling.

entries.title: demo-video-generator
entries.description: Generates a professional demo video (.mp4) of your SaaS app from a user journey: Playwright captures your screens, Remotion animates them (Ken Burns, highlights, text overlays) — Stripe/Linear product-tour style, no video editor needed.

entries.title: wiseman
entries.description: Summon a project-specific LLM wiki (the Wiseman) and consult it before you code.

entries.title: heavyskill
entries.description: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entries.title: ics-calendar
entries.description: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.

entries.title: jfrog
entries.description: Official JFrog plugin. Connect Claude Code to JFrog to manage, secure, and govern your software supply chain. Give agents the context to build secure, compliant software.

entries.title: devant
entries.description: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with codegraph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entries.title: sidecar
entries.description: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entries.title: tiered-development
entries.description: Three-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, Fable refines it and does the final deep review, fresh Opus builders write substantive code, and Sonnet handles mechanical edits, research, and per-step verification — a fresh agent per task so each gets a clean, focused context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and two helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave) the skill calls.

entries.title: classifier
entries.description: Text classification CLI using Bayesian, LSI, KNN, Logistic Regression, and TF-IDF algorithms

entries.title: paraqualis-gxp
entries.description: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entries.title: agent-harness
entries.description: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and supervise/wrap skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entries.title: korean-dart

entries.title: speculator
entries.description: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Quality In, Quality Out.

entries.description: Development tools and skills for the Tally project

entries.title: clairvoyance
entries.description: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entries.title: sig
entries.description: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entries.title: e2e-skills
entries.description: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.

entries.title: prism
entries.description: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entries.title: cloister-stale-sync
entries.description: Auto-invalidate ley-line-open's parse + LSP cache when Claude Code edits a file. Keeps lsp_hover/defs/refs/diagnostics fresh inside long sessions.

entries.title: foldkit-skills
entries.description: Skills for building Foldkit apps — app generator, message scaffolding, submodel extraction, and architecture auditing

entries.title: spec-drift
entries.description: Detects drift between a session's initial requirements and the final implementation. Extracts a requirement checklist at the start of a task, then compares it against the actual files to report missing, changed, silently-failed, or hardcoded items.

entries.title: ace
entries.description: AI Connect Engine — orchestrates the ACE lifecycle from idea through app building, Connect setup, LLO management, and closeout

entries.title: prompt-pocket
entries.description: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by agent-plugin-kit.

entries.title: river-review
entries.description: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entries.title: agi-super-team
entries.description: Virtual C-Suite of AI executives powered by legendary minds, with 1,651 skills
